web/tests/e2e/auth/password_managements..title: Code Injection: eval() Usage

web/tests/e2e/auth/password_managements..title: Privacy: PII Logged to Console
web/tests/e2e/auth/password_managements..description: PII fields logged to console. Log output may be stored in log aggregation services, exposing sensitive user data.
web/tests/e2e/auth/password_managements..fix: Remove PII from log statements. Use structured logging with PII redaction: logger.info({ userId: user.id }) instead of logging full user objects.

web/tests/e2e/mcp/default-agent-mcp.spec.title: Agent: Tool Invocations Not Logged

web/tests/e2e/mcp/mcp_oauth_flow.spec.ts.title: SQL Injection via Template Literal
web/tests/e2e/mcp/mcp_oauth_flow.spec.ts.description: SQL query with interpolated template variable. Use parameterized queries ($1, ?) or an ORM.
web/tests/e2e/mcp/mcp_oauth_flow.spec.ts.fix: Use parameterized queries: db.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = $1", [userId])

web/tests/e2e/mcp/mcp_oauth_flow.spec.ts.title: MCP: Server Without Authentication
web/tests/e2e/mcp/mcp_oauth_flow.spec.ts.description: MCP server created without any authentication configuration. Any client can connect and invoke tools.
web/tests/e2e/mcp/mcp_oauth_flow.spec.ts.fix: Add authentication to MCP server transport: API key validation, JWT verification, or OAuth

web/tests/e2e/mcp/mcp_oauth_flow.spec.ts.title: Agent: LLM Output Directly Triggers Actions
web/tests/e2e/mcp/mcp_oauth_flow.spec.ts.description: LLM output directly triggers side-effect actions without validation. Hallucinated or injected outputs can cause unintended actions.
web/tests/e2e/mcp/mcp_oauth_flow.spec.ts.fix: Validate LLM output against expected schemas before executing side effects. Add human confirmation for irreversible actions.

web/tests/e2e/mcp/mcp_oauth_flow.spec.ts.title: Agent: Runs With Elevated Permissions
web/tests/e2e/mcp/mcp_oauth_flow.spec.ts.description: Agent configured with elevated permissions (admin, root, service-role). Prompt injection inherits these privileges.
web/tests/e2e/mcp/mcp_oauth_flow.spec.ts.fix: Apply principle of least privilege. Agents should have minimal permissions required for their specific task.

backend/tests/integration/tests/llm_prov.fix: Validate LLM output against expected schemas before executing side effects. Add human confirmation for irreversible actions.

backend/tests/integration/tests/llm_prov.title: Agent: Runs With Elevated Permissions
backend/tests/integration/tests/llm_prov.description: Agent configured with elevated permissions (admin, root, service-role). Prompt injection inherits these privileges.
backend/tests/integration/tests/llm_prov.fix: Apply principle of least privilege. Agents should have minimal permissions required for their specific task.

backend/onyx/db/llm.py.title: LLM Output in SQL Query
backend/onyx/db/llm.py.description: LLM-generated text used in SQL query. Attacker can inject SQL via prompt injection.
backend/onyx/db/llm.py.fix: Never use LLM output in raw SQL. Validate against expected query patterns.

backend/onyx/db/llm.py.title: Agent: Runs With Elevated Permissions
backend/onyx/db/llm.py.description: Agent configured with elevated permissions (admin, root, service-role). Prompt injection inherits these privileges.
backend/onyx/db/llm.py.fix: Apply principle of least privilege. Agents should have minimal permissions required for their specific task.

backend/onyx/db/llm.py.title: Agent: LLM Output Directly Triggers Actions
backend/onyx/db/llm.py.description: LLM output directly triggers side-effect actions without validation. Hallucinated or injected outputs can cause unintended actions.
backend/onyx/db/llm.py.fix: Validate LLM output against expected schemas before executing side effects. Add human confirmation for irreversible actions.

backend/tests/external_dependency_unit/s.title: LLM Usage Without Cost Controls

backend/tests/external_dependency_unit/s.title: RAG: Raw Embeddings Returned to Client
backend/tests/external_dependency_unit/s.description: Raw embedding vectors returned in API responses. Research shows embeddings can be inverted to recover original text, leaking private data.
backend/tests/external_dependency_unit/s.fix: Never return raw embedding vectors in API responses. Embeddings should remain server-side only.

.github/workflows/post-merge-beta-cherry.title: CI/CD: pull_request_target with PR Checkout

web/src/app/admin/connector/[ccPairId]/I.title: RAG: User Upload Directly to Vector Store
web/src/app/admin/connector/[ccPairId]/I.description: User file uploads are fed directly into a vector database without review. This enables RAG poisoning — attackers upload documents containing hidden instructions.
web/src/app/admin/connector/[ccPairId]/I.fix: Add a review/approval pipeline between user uploads and vector store ingestion. Scan uploads for prompt injection patterns.

backend/scripts/debugging/litellm/call_l.title: Vibe Code: Placeholder Secret Left in Code

backend/tests/integration/tests/pruning/.title: XSS via jQuery .html()
backend/tests/integration/tests/pruning/.description: jQuery .html() with dynamic data enables XSS. Use .text() or sanitize.

backend/tests/integration/tests/pruning/.title: ReDoS: Nested Quantifiers in Regex
backend/tests/integration/tests/pruning/.description: Regex with nested quantifiers like (a+)+ or (\w+)* causes catastrophic backtracking.
backend/tests/integration/tests/pruning/.fix: Rewrite to avoid nested repetition or use a non-backtracking engine (re2 package).

backend/Dockerfile.title: Dockerfile: No Non-Root USER
backend/Dockerfile.description: No USER instruction found. Container runs as root, enabling escape attacks.
backend/Dockerfile.fix:
Add before CMD: RUN addgroup -S app && adduser -S app -G app
USER app

backend/alembic/versions/505c488f6662_me.title: Agent: LLM Output Directly Triggers Actions
backend/alembic/versions/505c488f6662_me.description: LLM output directly triggers side-effect actions without validation. Hallucinated or injected outputs can cause unintended actions.

backend/onyx/server/query_and_chat/chat_.title: LLM Endpoint Without Rate Limiting
backend/onyx/server/query_and_chat/chat_.description: AI endpoint without rate limiting. Users could rack up API costs.
backend/onyx/server/query_and_chat/chat_.fix: Add rate limiting per user: express-rate-limit, @upstash/ratelimit, etc.

backend/onyx/server/query_and_chat/chat_.title: Agent: No Spending/Token Limit
backend/onyx/server/query_and_chat/chat_.description: Agent makes LLM calls without token or cost limits. Enables denial of wallet attacks.
backend/onyx/server/query_and_chat/chat_.fix: Set max_tokens on all LLM calls. Implement per-session cost budgets.

backend/onyx/server/query_and_chat/chat_.title: Agent: Tool Invocations Not Logged
backend/onyx/server/query_and_chat/chat_.description: Agent tool invocations are not being logged or audited. Makes incident response and forensics impossible.
backend/onyx/server/query_and_chat/chat_.fix: Log all tool invocations including: tool name, arguments, caller identity, timestamp, and result status.

backend/tests/external_dependency_unit/t.title: Agent: LLM Output Directly Triggers Actions
backend/tests/external_dependency_unit/t.description: LLM output directly triggers side-effect actions without validation. Hallucinated or injected outputs can cause unintended actions.
backend/tests/external_dependency_unit/t.fix: Validate LLM output against expected schemas before executing side effects. Add human confirmation for irreversible actions.

backend/tests/external_dependency_unit/t.title: Timing Attack: String Comparison
backend/tests/external_dependency_unit/t.description: Direct string comparison of secrets is vulnerable to timing attacks.
backend/tests/external_dependency_unit/t.fix: Use crypto.timingSafeEqual(Buffer.from(a), Buffer.from(b))

backend/tests/external_dependency_unit/t.title: Timing Attack: String Comparison

.github/workflows/deployment.yml.title: CI/CD: Install Without Lockfile
.github/workflows/deployment.yml.description: CI runs npm install without --frozen-lockfile. Builds are non-deterministic.
.github/workflows/deployment.yml.fix: Use npm ci (not npm install) or yarn --frozen-lockfile in CI

.github/workflows/deployment.yml.title: Kubernetes: No NetworkPolicy Defined
.github/workflows/deployment.yml.description: Kubernetes manifests found but no NetworkPolicy defined. Without network policies, all pod-to-pod traffic is allowed.
.github/workflows/deployment.yml.fix: Add a NetworkPolicy resource to restrict pod-to-pod traffic

.github/workflows/deployment.yml.title: CI/CD: OIDC Token Request Without Subject Restriction
.github/workflows/deployment.yml.description: Workflow requests OIDC token (id-token: write). Verify the cloud trust policy restricts the subject claim to specific repos/branches to prevent privilege escalation.
.github/workflows/deployment.yml.fix: Ensure the cloud IAM trust policy sets a specific sub condition, not a wildcard.

backend/onyx/chat/process_message.py.title: API: File Upload Without Type Validation
backend/onyx/chat/process_message.py.description: File upload using original filename without type validation.
backend/onyx/chat/process_message.py.fix: Validate file extension and MIME type. Generate random filenames for storage.

backend/onyx/chat/process_message.py.title: Agent: User Input Written to Persistent Memory
backend/onyx/chat/process_message.py.description: User-controlled content written directly to agent persistent memory. Enables memory poisoning — attacker instructions persist across sessions.
backend/onyx/chat/process_message.py.fix: Sanitize and validate content before writing to agent memory. Separate user messages from system state.

backend/onyx/chat/process_message.py.title: Agent: Persistent Memory Without Expiration
backend/onyx/chat/process_message.py.description: Agent memory persists without expiration policy. Poisoned memories remain indefinitely.
backend/onyx/chat/process_message.py.fix: Set TTL or retention policies on agent memory. Implement periodic cleanup of stale entries.

backend/onyx/chat/process_message.py.title: Agent: Tool Invocations Not Logged
backend/onyx/chat/process_message.py.description: Agent tool invocations are not being logged or audited. Makes incident response and forensics impossible.
backend/onyx/chat/process_message.py.fix: Log all tool invocations including: tool name, arguments, caller identity, timestamp, and result status.

backend/tests/unit/onyx/chat/test_llm_st.title: MCP: Tool Call Without Validation
backend/tests/unit/onyx/chat/test_llm_st.description: MCP tool invocation without visible tool-name validation or allowlisting. Attackers can invoke arbitrary tools via tool poisoning.
backend/tests/unit/onyx/chat/test_llm_st.fix: Validate tool names against an explicit allowlist before execution

backend/tests/unit/onyx/chat/test_llm_st.title: MCP: Tool Call Without Validation
backend/tests/unit/onyx/chat/test_llm_st.description: MCP tool invocation without visible tool-name validation or allowlisting. Attackers can invoke arbitrary tools via tool poisoning.
backend/tests/unit/onyx/chat/test_llm_st.fix: Validate tool names against an explicit allowlist before execution

backend/tests/unit/onyx/chat/test_llm_st.title: Agent: Recursive Self-Invocation
backend/tests/unit/onyx/chat/test_llm_st.description: Agent can recursively invoke itself or spawn sub-agents without depth limits. Enables infinite loops.
backend/tests/unit/onyx/chat/test_llm_st.fix: Set max recursion depth for agent self-invocation. Track and limit sub-agent spawn depth.

backend/onyx/natural_language_processing.title: RAG: Raw Embeddings Returned to Client
backend/onyx/natural_language_processing.description: Raw embedding vectors returned in API responses. Research shows embeddings can be inverted to recover original text, leaking private data.
backend/onyx/natural_language_processing.fix: Never return raw embedding vectors in API responses. Embeddings should remain server-side only.

backend/tests/integration/tests/discord_.title: Agent: Runs With Elevated Permissions

backend/ee/onyx/server/features/hooks/ap.title: Agent: LLM Output Directly Triggers Actions
backend/ee/onyx/server/features/hooks/ap.description: LLM output directly triggers side-effect actions without validation. Hallucinated or injected outputs can cause unintended actions.
backend/ee/onyx/server/features/hooks/ap.fix: Validate LLM output against expected schemas before executing side effects. Add human confirmation for irreversible actions.

backend/model_server/encoders.py.title: RAG: Model Loaded With trust_remote_code=True
backend/model_server/encoders.py.description: Embedding or LLM model loaded with trust_remote_code=True. Allows execution of arbitrary code from the model repository.
backend/model_server/encoders.py.fix: Set trust_remote_code=False. Audit model code before enabling remote code execution.

backend/model_server/encoders.py.title: RAG: Embedding Endpoint Exposed Without Auth
backend/model_server/encoders.py.description: Embedding API endpoint exposed without authentication. Attackers can enumerate embeddings or generate vectors for injection attacks.
backend/model_server/encoders.py.fix: Add authentication middleware to embedding endpoints.

backend/onyx/context/search/federated/sl.title: RAG: Retrieved Chunks Used Without Filtering
backend/onyx/context/search/federated/sl.description: Retrieved document chunks injected into LLM prompt without filtering. Poisoned documents can override system instructions.
backend/onyx/context/search/federated/sl.fix: Filter retrieved chunks: remove instruction-like content, apply relevance score thresholds, limit number of chunks.

backend/scripts/debugging/onyx_redis.py.title: Exception: Python Bare except: (catches everything)

backend/tests/integration/tests/pruning/.title: ReDoS: .* with Lookahead
backend/tests/integration/tests/pruning/.description: Regex with .* followed by lookahead can cause catastrophic backtracking on non-matching input.
backend/tests/integration/tests/pruning/.fix: Replace .* with a bounded class like [^\n]{0,N} or use a non-backtracking engine (re2).

.github/workflows/sandbox-deployment.yml.fix: Ensure the cloud IAM trust policy sets a specific sub condition, not a wildcard.

backend/onyx/tools/tool_implementations/.title: MCP: stdio Transport Without Sandbox
backend/onyx/tools/tool_implementations/.description: MCP server using stdio transport runs in the same process context. Consider sandboxing for untrusted tools.
backend/onyx/tools/tool_implementations/.fix: Run MCP servers in sandboxed containers or separate processes with limited permissions

backend/scripts/run_industryrag_bench_qu.title: Agent: No Schema Validation on LLM Output
backend/scripts/run_industryrag_bench_qu.description: LLM JSON output parsed without schema validation. Malformed or malicious output can cause unexpected behavior.
backend/scripts/run_industryrag_bench_qu.fix: Validate LLM structured output against a schema (Zod, Joi, Pydantic) before processing.

backend/shared_configs/configs.py.title: RAG: Excessive Retrieved Context
backend/shared_configs/configs.py.description: Retrieving a very large number of chunks (50+). Increases the attack surface for prompt injection via poisoned documents.
backend/shared_configs/configs.py.fix: Limit retrieved chunks to the minimum needed (typically 3-10). More chunks = more injection surface.

backend/onyx/connectors/notion/connector.title: RAG: Internal Metadata Exposed in Response
backend/onyx/connectors/notion/connector.description: Internal document metadata (file paths, sources, authors) returned in API responses. Leaks information about the knowledge base structure.
backend/onyx/connectors/notion/connector.fix: Strip internal metadata before returning responses. Only expose necessary fields to the client.

backend/tests/external_dependency_unit/a.title: RAG: Raw Embeddings Returned to Client
backend/tests/external_dependency_unit/a.description: Raw embedding vectors returned in API responses. Research shows embeddings can be inverted to recover original text, leaking private data.
backend/tests/external_dependency_unit/a.fix: Never return raw embedding vectors in API responses. Embeddings should remain server-side only.

web/src/sections/knowledge/SourceHierarc.title: RAG: No Content Filtering on Ingestion
web/src/sections/knowledge/SourceHierarc.description: Document loaders used without content filtering. Loaded content goes directly to embedding/vector store.
web/src/sections/knowledge/SourceHierarc.fix: Add content filtering after loading documents: remove scripts, detect injection patterns, validate format.

backend/tests/unit/onyx/connectors/zende.fix: Strip internal metadata before returning responses. Only expose necessary fields to the client.

web/src/app/admin/configuration/search/U.title: RAG: Raw Embeddings Returned to Client
web/src/app/admin/configuration/search/U.description: Raw embedding vectors returned in API responses. Research shows embeddings can be inverted to recover original text, leaking private data.
web/src/app/admin/configuration/search/U.fix: Never return raw embedding vectors in API responses. Embeddings should remain server-side only.

web/src/app/admin/embeddings/pages/Embed.title: RAG: Raw Embeddings Returned to Client
web/src/app/admin/embeddings/pages/Embed.description: Raw embedding vectors returned in API responses. Research shows embeddings can be inverted to recover original text, leaking private data.
web/src/app/admin/embeddings/pages/Embed.fix: Never return raw embedding vectors in API responses. Embeddings should remain server-side only.

desktop/src/titlebar.js.title: Exception: Empty catch Block
desktop/src/titlebar.js.description: Empty catch block silently swallows errors. Failures go undetected, masking bugs and security issues.
desktop/src/titlebar.js.fix: Handle the error: catch (err) { logger.error("Context:", err); throw err; }

desktop/src-tauri/src/main.rs.fix: Use .unwrap_or(), .unwrap_or_default(), or ? operator for error propagation.
